rules.domain-method: Define the asset, actor, entry point, trust boundary, and capability, using only safe local or disposable proof.
rules.evidence-return: Return the finding, evidence class, prerequisites, controls, uncertainty, and exact artifact paths.
rules.evidence-class: Label each finding as reproduced, code-supported, or hypothetical.
rules.no-overclaim: Do not convert a hardening idea into a proven vulnerability.
rules.no-fix: Do not implement fixes or attack live systems during an audit.
rules.no-authority: Do not approve a result or declare the project complete.
